text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, King Halo and I are going to a fashion show for the latest
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We agreed to meet up at 9 a.m., but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You're late! What time do you think it is?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If I say 9 a.m., then I mean 8 a.m.! Gosh, how could you keep me
waiting for a whole hour?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Making me, a first-rate Umamusume, stand alone at the back of the
line...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As your punishment, you'll have to treat me to some tea before we
head back. Hmph, be grateful that I'm letting you off the hook this
time!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Please, I'm practically being magnanimous. Anyway, enough with the
chitchat—hurry up and get in line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo pulls me into the line.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There are so many people here that it might be hard to see the stage.
choice_data_list: It seems like it's a pretty popular show.
It seems like it's a pretty popular show.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course it's popular... Perhaps you don't fully comprehend the
significance of today's event, so let me enlighten you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Today, only the finest brands will be shown. We'll see the best outfits
from the best designers! Truly a first-rate experience!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The show's going to be so good that you won't even want to blink.
Don't even think about looking away for a second!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Especially when it comes to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's eyes sparkle with excitement as she rattles off every
aspect of the fashion show.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One hour later...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for the show to start, but we've barely moved
forward... I can't see anything from here...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I hope they didn't make us wait all this time just to tell us that they've
already reached max capacity...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why on earth would I do that? Today's show is—

text_block_list.name: Show Staff
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, are you King Halo?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah... yes, that's right. Who might you be?

text_block_list.name: Show Staff
text_block_list.text:
Aha, I had a feeling. I'm part of the event operations team. I wanted
to say that it's been an honor to work with your mother on the show—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm well aware that my mother's designs are the main event and will be
showcased as the grand finale.

text_block_list.name: Show Staff
text_block_list.text:
So you're interested in her work as well? Of course, you're her
daughter after all. I've heard from your mother that you've been
fantastic at Tracen—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Are you sure that's what you heard?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Please, spare me the platitudes. I know well what she would say, and especially what she wouldn't. Like you said, I am her daughter.

text_block_list.name: Show Staff
text_block_list.text: Oh, my apologies... Well, if you'll excuse me then...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I guess he was one of my mother's acquaintances.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm, it looks like you've got something to say. Well, don't make me
wait—just get it out already.
choice_data_list: I didn't know your mother was part of this show.
I didn't know your mother was part of this show.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After my mother retired from racing, she became a professional
designer for signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It pains me to say this, but she truly embodies "first-rate". She
surpasses everyone's expectations with each and every dress she
makes.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Her designs are timeless, crafted with perfection for all racers. There's
a lot to be learned from her work.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I suppose not all racers. She never made anything for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter though. Her talent in design didn't carry over into
sewing. Honestly, she's terribly clumsy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her own shortcomings, she's always been overly competitive
and vain. She's loath to show even her own daughter something less
than perfect.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I remember how she bought a birthday cake for me, watched me eat
it, then hid in another room to eat her own failed creation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's ridiculous. I wish she'd just acknowledge her weaknesses and
failures.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Not at all!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, thank you for waiting! We'll now begin guiding you all to
the event hall!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's about time. Come on, let's get going.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...They better show some excellent dresses. Otherwise, I won't forgive
them for making me wait so long.

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
And that concludes today's event. Thank you for coming. Please
return home safely.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That... was... amazing! Did you see the new designs by UMADA? Oh
my gosh, I love how they designed the switching skirt!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But the prettiest one was definitely—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Never mind!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Just you wait and see. I'm going to surpass my mother's race
record in no time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I won't just have one signature racewear—I'm going to have a
whole closet full of them!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Because I'm a first-rate racer—the one and only King Halo!
choice_data_list: Yes you are. Let's give it our all!
Yes you are. Let's give it our all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! I'm glad you're on the same page as me! Excellent! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's head back to the academy now. We've got lots of planning to
do for tomorrow's training schedule!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As King Halo walks away from the event hall, her face shines with
ever-increasing determination.
